## Meeting Purpose

[Align on pivot to tools/templates scope and execution](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Reprioritize to tools → templates → Pry.co; deprioritize editorial while raising baseline quality to avoid SEO risk (cannibalization, weak on-page, edit delays)](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Launch tools under /tools with 5+ initial pages; use template hub for “soft conversions” and paid traffic; model IA on Smartsheet/Canva; avoid Ramp-style URL structure](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Resource plan: dedicate FT engineer; unblock via Greg (Sanity, data access, inputs approvals); deliver V1 tools/templates strategy by Thu/Fri; contract terms to update](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [Phase 2: consider programmatic i18n (Dutch, UK, Spanish) and Pry.co duplication/variants; Sanity performance fix needed (45 min publish latency → target \~2–5 min)](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)

## Topics

### Editorial quality + SEO risks (current state)

  - [Quality bar below target (≈6/10) → Jon can produce faster than current edit cycle](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [On-page issues → excessive repeated citations; missed content elements vs Ramp; insufficient SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Keyword selection miss → targeting terms where Brex already ranks top 5/top 10 → keyword cannibalization risk](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Actionable signals available → GSC/Ahrefs/SEMrush should flag existing rankings; ensure pre-brief checks before drafting](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Competitive gap → Ramp articles more robust; would outrank current drafts without fixes](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)

### Tools program (highest priority)

  - [Goal → create high-volume, high-intent “soft conversion” inventory (e.g., invoice generator/template, QR/PDF utilities later)](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Launch requirement → minimum 5 tools at go-live so hub doesn’t look thin](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [URL strategy → /tools as parent; all tools nested (e.g., /tools/invoice-template); avoid past Ramp structure](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [Monetization/visibility → supports SEO, interlinks into core funnels, and unlocks paid (ads to tools)](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Input governance → some tool inputs require internal approvals; build admin fields so Jon can set values post-launch](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)

### Templates hub (second priority)

  - [Purpose → capture “{thing} template” demand; convert via downloads/uses; interlink from related articles and product pages](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [IA/UX models → Smartsheet (category pages with multiple variations), Canva (strong template taxonomy + filters), Coefficient (reference; org is “weird”)](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Structure → consider /templates as parent with topical subfolders (e.g., /templates/expense-management/expense-report, mileage, per-diem)](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Content pattern → short “how-to” sections on template pages; cross-linking among tools, templates, and guides; “+ template” in meta where appropriate](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
  - [Asset formats → Google Sheets/Excel first (easy to create); evaluate FreshBooks-style pages; ensure CTAs placed in relevant editorial (e.g., expense reporting)](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)

### Pry.co strategy (third priority)

  - [Leverage Pry.co’s higher DR/PR links for outsized lift vs microsites](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Duplicate/selectively adapt tools/templates on Pry.co where strategic; coordinate canonicalization/internal linking to avoid duplication issues](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [“Strip down” Pry.co bloat first; then layer tools/templates; future content play possible](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)

### CMS and platform constraints

  - [Sanity latency → publish taking \~45 min (was \~2 min) → investigate and remediate (build hooks, cache/CDN, webhooks, or schema ops)](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Access mapping → Greg owns web/Sanity; new hire on Core Web Vitals; align permissions, data sources, deployment path to keep engineering out of design release freeze](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)

### Internationalization (phase 2)

  - [Emerging need → Dutch pages; separate UK version; explore Spanish (programmatic approach proven on other clients)](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [Considerations → language accuracy, locale routing, hreflang, template/tool localization (e.g., currencies, VAT rates), Spend Trends expansion to ES](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)

### Proof points and guardrails

  - [Lovable precedent → 3M impressions, 150 purchases from templates (LTV ≈ $250); strong non-brand utility signal; robust organization and UX](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [Backlinks discourse → avoid bulk/low-quality agency patterns; focus on useful assets that earn links organically](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)

### Resourcing, scope, timeline

  - [GrowthX to assign FT engineer; sprint once access unblocked](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [Contract shift → only \~3 weeks left; update language for early conversion or project-based milestone; proceed without delivery risk](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [Delivery cadence → talk to Greg by Thu; provide V1 tools/templates strategy by Thu/Fri/Mon; execute fast post-approval](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1929.0)

## Next Steps

      - [Contract update proposal (scope reallocation, FT engineer, milestones/timing) → Thu](https://fathom.video/share/hzo92tTVpukeShwzkUpgXq9r9qV45o9P?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)

action_items.description: Connect with Greg to finalize access, data sources, and logistics for tool and template buildout; clarify blockers and team responsibilities
Develop and share a V1 strategy proposal for template organization and filters, referencing Lovable, Smartsheet, Canva, and Coefficient examples; deliver by Friday or Monday
Talk to the contract team to review and potentially update contract wording to reflect project scope shift and early conversion options; report back to Jon Kowieski
